html_prompt.context: Generate semantic single-page HTML for Indonesian elementary school (SD/MI) company profile. Theme: SAGE MINT (#3a8f6f). Target: Parents and students. Static HTML only, no CMS.

sections.content: Sticky nav with backdrop blur, logo + school name, hamburger menu (☰→✕ animation), active state on scroll
Image slider (3 slides, 4s autoplay), prev/next + dots, school name + tagline fade-in, 2 CTA buttons, SVG wave divider bottom
History paragraph, Vision-Mission 2 cards with icons, Principal welcome (photo + name + quote), accent border quote block
4 counters (students: 1240, teachers: 68, extracurricular: 24, established: 1985), accreditation badge with stars
4 feature cards with Font Awesome icons, facility photo grid (lab, library, field, hall) with hover zoom
Visual hierarchy chart: Principal → Vice → Coordinator with connector lines and names
Grid 8 teacher cards, photo + name + subject, flip card structure (front/back)
Tab filter (Extracurricular/Achievements/Activities), grid content switching with fade animation
Horizontal timeline or badge grid, year + name + level (city/province/national), trophy icons (gold/silver/bronze)
3 news cards (thumb, title, date, excerpt), announcement list with 'New' badge, academic calendar table
Masonry grid 9+ photos, lightbox trigger, title overlay on hover
Auto-sliding carousel, quote + photo + name + role (parent/alumni), dots + pause on hover
Responsive Google Maps iframe, address card + operating hours
WhatsApp button (wa.me/6281234567890), email + phone icons, social links (IG/FB/YT/TikTok), guestbook form (name, email, message) mailto action
School info + logo, quick links, social icons, copyright '[BRAND] by ilycode softwarelabs'

technical_requirements: Single file HTML with inline CSS/JS ready markers
Semantic HTML5 tags (header, nav, section, footer)
Data attributes for JS hooks (data-counter, data-flip, etc.)
Accessibility: aria-label, alt texts, focus indicators
Content placeholders using: SMA Nusantara Bangsa, 'Membentuk Generasi Cerdas...', Jl. Pendidikan No.17 Depok
html_prompt.output: Complete index.html with all 15 sections, ready for styling and scripting
